name: list_revisions
description: Tool to list a file's revisions. use when you need to retrieve the revision history of a specific file in google drive.

fileId.description:
The ID of the file.
Example: "1234567890abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"

pageSize.description:
The maximum number of revisions to return per page.
Example: 100

pageToken.description:
The token for continuing a previous list request on the next page. This should be set to the value of 'nextPageToken' from the previous response.
Example: "abcdef123456"

supportsAllDrives.description: Whether the requesting application supports both My Drives and shared drives. Defaults to false.
